title: Component Selection Guide
description: When to use which component - guidance for enterprise applications

components.name: Tabs
components.useFor: Switching between related views at same level
tips: Use for filtering/viewing same dataset differently
Keep tab labels short and clear
Don't use tabs for sequential steps (use stepper instead)
Consider if accordion is better for fewer options

components.name: Breadcrumb
tips: All items should be clickable except current
Truncate middle items on long paths if needed

components.name: Pagination
tips: Include 'jump to page' for large datasets
Consider 'load more' for some use cases

components.name: Table (Basic/Advanced)
components.useFor: Tabular data, sortable lists, data management
tips: Use advanced version for sorting, filtering, bulk actions
Keep columns minimal - only show necessary data
Enable column resizing but with sensible defaults

components.name: Card
components.useFor: Grouping related info, dashboard widgets, summaries
tips: Use for summary views and KPIs
Cards in a grid should be consistent height
Don't overcrowd cards with too much info

components.name: Progress Bar
tips: Include cancel option for long operations

components.name: Spinner
components.avoidFor: Progress that users need to measure
tips: Consider skeleton screens for longer operations
Don't block entire page when only part is loading

components.name: Status Indicator
tips: Use consistent status colors across app
Include text label in addition to color
Status should be scannable in lists

components.name: Text Field
tips: Always include labels (not placeholder as label)
Use appropriate input type (email, tel, number)

components.name: Textarea
tips: Show character count when limits exist
Consider rich text editor for formatted content

components.name: Select / Dropdown
components.avoidFor: 2-4 options (use radio buttons), binary choices (use toggle)
tips: Consider native select for simple cases

components.name: Checkbox
components.useFor: Multiple selections from a list, binary yes/no
tips: Group related checkboxes under a label
'Select all' for large lists with few selected

components.name: Radio Button
tips: Always have a default selection when possible
Consider dropdown for more than 5 options

components.name: Switch / Toggle
tips: Use for settings that take effect immediately
Label should state the current state, not action

components.name: Date Picker
tips: Consider native input type='date' for simple cases

components.name: File Upload
tips: Show upload progress for large files
Display uploaded files with remove option
Indicate allowed file types and size limits

components.name: Modal
components.avoidFor: Complex forms, sequential tasks, large data
tips: Clear close button and escape key support

components.name: Alert
tips: Include clear action or dismiss option

components.name: Popover / Tooltip
tips: Don't put critical actions in tooltips
Dismiss on click outside or escape
